This folder contains dependencies needed to compile visualvm. The visualvm repo explains this but not how to install it on windows.

# Installing ant
1. Unzip the apache-ant zip file to C:\apache-ant
2. Add a system environment variable called ANT_HOME that points to C:\apache-ant
3. Add %ANT_HOME%\bin to the system PATH variable

# Installing jdk 8
1. click on the installer and run it
2. Make sure your system PATH variable has C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-8.0.482.8-hotspot\bin
